name: Smart Watch Pro
description: AMOLED display, heart rate and SpO2 sensors, GPS, and multi-day battery. Pairs with iOS and Android for notifications and workouts.

name: 5G Smartphone
description: Flagship triple-lens camera, 120Hz OLED screen, fast charging, and 256GB storage for photos, games, and apps.

name: Noise-Canceling Earbuds
description: True wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation, transparency mode, and wireless charging case for commute and travel.

name: Smart Speaker Voice
description: Hands-free voice assistant, room-filling 360 sound, and smart home routines compatible with major platforms.

name: Tablet 11 inch
description: Thin lightweight tablet with stylus support, ideal for notes, streaming, and light productivity on the go.

name: Fitness Tracker Band
description: 24/7 activity tracking, sleep stages, guided breathing, and water resistance for swimming and daily wear.

name: 4K Smart TV 55
description: HDR streaming apps built-in, voice remote, and low-latency mode for movies and console gaming in the living room.

name: Smart Security Camera
description: 1080p night vision, motion alerts to your phone, two-way audio, and easy wall or shelf mounting indoors.

name: USB-C Power Bank 20K
description: High-capacity portable battery with PD fast charge for laptop, phone, and tablet during travel or outages.

name: Wireless Charging Pad
description: Qi-certified fast wireless charger with non-slip surface, works with phones and earbuds cases overnight.

name: Mesh WiFi System
description: Whole-home coverage with easy app setup, parental controls, and seamless roaming between satellite nodes.

name: 4K Action Camera
description: Waterproof rugged body, stabilization for sports, and Wi-Fi transfer to edit and share clips from your phone.
